chunks.text: Technical Reports - Domenico Ferrari. The Dynamic Management of Guaranteed Performance Connections in Packet Switched Integrated Service Networks (CSD-94-859) Colin J. Parris and Domenico Ferrari. Guaranteeing Performance for Real-Time Communication in Wide-Area Networks (CSD-88-485) Domenico Ferrari. The DASH Project: An Overview (CSD-88-405) David P. Anderson and Domenico Ferrari. An Empirical Investigation of Load Indices for Load Balancing Applications (CSD-87-353) Domenico Ferrari and Songnian Zhou.
chunks.question: What are some technical reports by Domenico Ferrari from 1987 to 1994?
chunks.answer: Reports on performance, DASH, and load balancing.

chunks.text: The Empirical Evaluation of a Security-Oriented Datagram Protocol (CSD-87-350) David P. Anderson, Domenico Ferrari, P. Venkat Rangan and B. Sartirana. Subtransport Level: The Right Place for End-to-End Security Mechanisms (CSD-87-346) David P. Anderson, Domenico Ferrari and P. Venkat Rangan. A Protocol for Secure Communication in Large Distributed Systems (CSD-87-342) David P. Anderson, Domenico Ferrari, P. Venkat Rangan and B. Sartirana. The DASH Project: Issues in the Design of Very Large Distributed Systems (CSD-87-338) David P. Anderson, Domenico Ferrari, P. Venkat Rangan and Shin-Yuan Tzou.
chunks.question: What security and distributed systems reports did Ferrari co-author in 1987?
chunks.answer: Security protocols and DASH project issues.

chunks.text: An Experimental Study of Load Balancing Performance (CSD-87-336) Songnian Zhou and Domenico Ferrari. A Study of Load Indices for Load Balancing Schemes (CSD-86-262) Domenico Ferrari. Sensitivity Study of the Clustering Approach to Workload Modeling (CSD-85-222) Maria Calzarossa and Domenico Ferrari. Considerations on the Insularity of Performance Evaluation (CSD-84-209) Domenico Ferrari. The Evolution of Berkeley UNIX (CSD-83-155) Domenico Ferrari.
chunks.question: What topics did Ferrari's reports cover from 1983 to 1987?
chunks.answer: Load balancing, workload modeling, and UNIX evolution.

chunks.text: Modeling File System Organizations in a Local Area Network Environment (CSD-83-142) Domenico Ferrari and Tzong-yu Paul Lee. On the Foundations of Artificial Workload Design (CSD-82-110) Domenico Ferrari. Working Set Size Strings (CSD-82-109) Domenico Ferrari. Characterization and Reproduction of Program Referencing Dynamics (M81/22) Domenico Ferrari. An Experiment in Program Reconstructuring for Performance Enhancement (M580) Domenico Ferrari and Edwin Lau.
chunks.question: What are some early 1980s reports by Ferrari on system performance?
chunks.answer: File systems, workload design, and program restructuring.

chunks.text: Characterizing and Reproducing Program Referencing Dynamics (M82/20) C.R. Dutt and D. Ferrari. VSWS: The Variable-Interval Sampled Working Set Policy (M82/16) Domenico Ferrari and Yiu-Yo Yih. Program Restructuring in a Multilevel Virtual Memory (M81/26) Edwin J. Lau and Domenico Ferrari. A Study in Operating System Performance Measurement and Modeling (M550) David S. Lindsay and Domenico Ferrari.
chunks.question: What memory and performance studies did Ferrari contribute to?
chunks.answer: Working set policies and OS performance modeling.
